---
title: "Car Gas Plots"
author: "Mr. Boerman"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(lubridate)
library(tidyr)
```


```{r}
# Read the data directly from GitHub
gas_log <- read_csv("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/michaelboerman/bmeg_226/main/input_data/car_gas_log.csv") |> 
  mutate(
    date = mdy(date),
    mpg = miles / gallons,
    cost_per_gallon = cost / gallons,
    cost_per_mile = cost / miles,
    year = year(date),
    month = month(date, label = TRUE)
  )

# Display the processed data
head(gas_log)
```

```{r}

gas_log |>
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = mpg)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(color = cost_per_gallon), size = 2) +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "green", high = "red", name = "$/gallon") +
  labs(
    title = "Fuel Efficiency (MPG) Over Time",
    subtitle = "Points colored by cost per gallon",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Miles Per Gallon (MPG)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```


```{r}
gas_log |>
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = cost_per_gallon)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkred", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "blue", fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.3) +
  labs(
    title = "Cost Per Gallon Over Time",
    subtitle = "With linear trend line",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Cost per Gallon ($)",
    caption = "Data shows price fluctuations 2021-2023"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, face = "italic"))

```

```{r}
gas_log |>
  ggplot(aes(x = date, y = cost_per_gallon)) +
  geom_line(color = "darkred", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "blue", fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.3) +
  labs(
    title = "Cost Per Gallon Over Time",
    subtitle = "With linear trend line",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Cost per Gallon ($)",
    caption = "Data shows price fluctuations 2021-2023"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, face = "italic"))
```

```{r}
annual_summary <- gas_log |>
  group_by(year) |>
  summarise(
    avg_mpg = mean(mpg),
    avg_cost_per_gallon = mean(cost_per_gallon),
    total_miles = sum(miles),
    total_cost = sum(cost),
    n_fillups = n()
  )

annual_summary |>
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(avg_mpg, avg_cost_per_gallon),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  ) |>
  mutate(metric = recode(metric, 
    "avg_mpg" = "Avg MPG",
    "avg_cost_per_gallon" = "Avg $/Gallon"
  )) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(year), y = value, fill = metric)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", width = 0.7) +
  facet_wrap(~metric, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("Avg MPG" = "forestgreen", "Avg $/Gallon" = "coral")) +
  labs(
    title = "Annual Fuel Economy and Cost Comparison",
    x = "Year",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

```


```{r}
gas_log |>
  ggplot(aes(x = month, y = mpg)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue", alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.1, alpha = 0.5, color = "navy") +
  labs(
    title = "Monthly Variation in Fuel Efficiency",
    subtitle = "Boxplots show distribution; points show individual fill-ups",
    x = "Month",
    y = "MPG"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```

```{r}
gas_log |>
  group_by(year) |>
  summarise(
    `Total Miles` = sum(miles),
    `Total Cost ($)` = round(sum(cost), 2),
    `Avg MPG` = round(mean(mpg), 1),
    `Avg $/Gallon` = round(mean(cost_per_gallon), 2),
    `Fill-ups` = n()
  ) |>
  knitr::kable()

```
